task_description.goal: Implement SpecKV + Similarity Deduplication algorithm that combines frequency scoring with R-KV's similarity-based redundancy removal
scope: Modify sparse_round_pruner_prefill_keep.py to add similarity scoring
Create new YAML config files for different mix_lambda values
Create shell scripts for experiments with lambda=0.1,0.3,0.5,0.7,0.9
task_description.context: R-KV/docs/speckv_similarity_dedup_idea.md specifies the design. Use cal_similarity from HuggingFace/rkv/utils.py. Must NOT break existing SpecKV experiments.

deliverables.code_modification: Modify SparseRoundPruner to support similarity scoring with backward-compatible flags
deliverables.config_files: Create 5 YAML configs for lambda values (0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9)
deliverables.shell_scripts: Create 5 shell scripts in new folder under R-KV/weian_script/aime24_official_sampled8/

compatibility_requirements: run_speckv_aime24_official_sampled8_norm.sh must work identically before and after changes
No changes to existing experiment results

constraints: Must not break existing SpecKV experiments
New parameters must default to disabled state
Must use R-KV's cal_similarity function directly
all_patterns: Parameter passing through YAML config → dispatch script → runner script
